meta_description: Massachusetts is a state of firsts. The first shot of the American Revolution. The first public school, park, and library. The first state constitution. We’ve always been at the forefront of America and the ways it dreams. As we mark the 250th anniversary of our country and independence, we’re inviting fellow Americans, and the world, to experience the history we’ve made and continue to make.
